entry.content:
Dai Yuqin


My name is Dai Yuqin and I’m a year 2 of postgraduate student. 😁

Master Student

Nanjing University of Science and Technology

Nanjing, Jiangsu, China.

Email: daiy@njust.edu.cn

Tel: +86 19825000671

BIOGRAPHY

I am a year-2 master student at NJUST, under the supervision of Prof. Jian Yang, and co-supervised by Prof. Jun Li. I obtained my B.E. in Computer Science at NJUST in 2022. I was sponsored by IGSF in 2020 to participate in a one-semester exchange program at the University of Dayton. Currently, I am a research intern at Tsinghua University, in the THUSIGSICLAB led by Prof. Xiu Li.

My research interests lie in the AIGC tasks, 3D Generation and Motion Generation.

Feel free to contact me by email if you are interested in discussing or collaborating with me.

EDUCATION & VISITING


EDUCATION

Nanjing University of Science and Technology

Master of Computer Science and Engineering.

Supervised by Prof. Jian Yang, in PCA Lab.

Co-supervised by Prof. Jun Li

Sep 2022 - Jun. 2025

 Nanjing University of Science and Technology

 Bachelor of Intelligence Science and Technology.

 Qian Xuesen College

 Sep 2018 - Jun 2022


VISITING

Tsinghua University

Research Assistant in THUSIGSICLAB

 Advisor: Prof. Xiu Li

 Apr. 2023 - Jan. 2024

 University of Dayton

 Exchange student funded by IGSF. (GPA: 4.0/4.0)

 🏆2020 Dean’s list

 Jan 2020 - Jul 2020


PUBLICATIONS

Published in 2024

  • [ICASSP] [CCF-B] [IF 12.04]

    Text2Avatar: Text to 3D Human Avatar Generation with Codebook-Driven Body Controllable Attribute, ICASSP2024

    [arxiv]

    Text2Avatar is the first model that can generate realistic-style 3D avatars based on complex and coupled input text prompts, achieving multiattribute controllable and realistic 3D human avatar generation.

    • Related area: Cross-modal Generation, Decoupling Control, 3D Avatar Reconstruction, NeRF Generation.

  • [ICASSP] [CCF-B] [IF 12.04]

    EXPLORING MULTI-MODAL CONTROL IN MUSIC-DRIVEN DANCE GENERATION, ICASSP2024 (IF 12.04)

    [arxiv]

    We propose a unified framework capable of generating high-quality dance movements and supporting multi-modal control, including genre control, semantic control, and spatial control simultaneously.

    • Related area: Human Motion Controllability, Human Motion Generation, SMPL, Cross-Modal Generation, Multi-media.

Published in 2020

  • [CSTPCD] [北大核心] [IF 0.87]

基于Encoder-Decoder注意力网络的异常驾驶行为在线识别方法，兵器装备工程学报2023

We proposed a framework for real-time monitoring of drivers’ abnormal driving behavior. Unlike existing methods that rely on a large number of expensive and high-precision sensors, we only use mobile phone data for abnormal driving behavior detection, making our method more practical.

  • Related area: Abnormal driving, Deep Learning, LSTM, Attention Mechanism.

  • [北大核心] [IF 0.33]

转动惯量平行轴定理验证实验的改进方案，大学物理2020

We have found a method that is more accurate compared to the current teaching method, which can significantly reduce the amount of error introduced during the measurement of the moment of inertia of rigid bodies in experiments. This will help college students to conduct experiments more effectively and gain a better understanding of the experimental principles.

  • Related area: Moment of inertia of rigid bodies, experimental physics.


PATENTS


  • Online recognition methods of abnormal driving based on Encoder-Decoder attention network and LSTM

    Appl. No.(Patent No.)：CN202111675120.8 Appl. date：2021-12-31 00:00:00

    Pub. No.：CN202111675120.8 Pub.date：：2022-05-27 00:00:00

    Applicant(s)：Nanjing University of Science and Technology

    Inventor(s)：TANG Kun, YANG Li, DAI Yuqin, GUO Tangyi, XU Yongneng


RESEARCH EXPERIENCE


Apr 2023

Research Internship at Tsinghua University(QS 26, Top University in China)

Completed two papers in the field of 3D avatar generation in collaboration with others. In the project, I was responsible for coding, contributed to idea generation, and participated in paper writing.

Jan 2021 - Oct 2021

Abnormal Detection of Risky Driving Behavior Project

Published a paper and obtained a patent through this experience. Based on the Encoder-Decoder framework and used an open source(driverBehaviorDataset) to automatically detect risky behavior in real-time. I undertook most of the coding and the draft paper writing tasks. Founded by National-level Innovation and Entrepreneurship Projects for College Students

RELEVENT SKILLS


  • Certifications: CET4: 623, CET6: 575
  • Languages: IELTS: 7.0 (In 2020 and 2021. I am confident in my ability to secure another one.)

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing

Run server

$ hexo server

More info: Server

Generate static files

$ hexo generate

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
